title: Vibe Teacher Persona Created
what_happened: Built teaching-focused persona for technical learning, calibrated to V's baseline (non-technical founder, strong system thinking, 10-15% knowledge stretch target)
why_significant: Enables dedicated mode for technical education with validation protocols, Careerspan-relevant analogies, and Socratic methods for deeper understanding
key_insights: Teaching persona needs explicit baseline calibration (what V knows vs doesn't)
Validation protocol critical: key takeaways + 3 application questions at conversation end
Analogies must be domain-specific (career systems, N5 workflows) not generic
10-15% stretch zone prevents both boredom and overwhelm
what_worked: Loading existing persona (Vibe Builder) as template reference
Asking clarifying questions before building (teaching style, validation preferences, technical baseline)
Separating 'explaining mode' (analogies, fundamentals) from 'socratic mode' (questions, realization)
Explicit anti-patterns section (jargon, knowledge jumps, HOW-before-WHY)
principles_applied: P1 (Human-Readable): Persona written for LLM but structured for V to review
P2 (SSOT): Referenced existing context files rather than duplicating
P15 (Complete Before Claiming): Built full persona, validated character count, created lesson
next_time: Test persona in actual teaching thread to validate calibration
Track which analogy patterns work best for V
Build 'technical concept library' of explained topics with successful analogies
